# @baerae-zkap/design-system

> React component library with 42 UI components and a design token system.
> Colors use CSS custom properties for automatic dark mode switching.

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install @baerae-zkap/design-system
```

```tsx
import { Button, Card, TextField, ListCell } from '@baerae-zkap/design-system';
import { spacing, typography, radius } from '@baerae-zkap/design-system';
```

Colors in styles: `color: 'var(--content-base-default)'`. Component color props: `primary`, `neutral`, `success`, `error`, `warning`, `info`.

## Component Selection Guide

Follow top-to-bottom; use the first match.

### Actions

| Need to... | Use |
|------------|-----|
| Primary action | `<Button buttonType="filled" color="primary">` |
| Secondary/cancel action | `<Button buttonType="weak" color="neutral">` |
| Destructive action | `<Button buttonType="filled" color="error">` |
| Soft destructive action | `<Button buttonType="weak" color="error">` |
| Text-only inline link | `<TextButton>` |
| Icon-only action | `<IconButton aria-label="...">` |
| Tag/filter toggle | `<Chip>` |
| Button group at bottom of modal/sheet/page | `<ActionArea>` |

### Contents

| Content is... | Use |
|---------------|-----|
| Interactive info block (onClick required) | `<Card>` |
| Thumbnail + text list item | `<ListCard>` |
| Settings/menu row | `<ListCell>` |
| Section title with optional action | `<SectionHeader>` |
| Expandable/collapsible detail | `<Accordion>` |
| Status or category label | `<ContentBadge>` |
| User profile picture | `<Avatar>` (multiple: `<AvatarGroup>`) |
| Numeric count or status overlay | `<Badge>` |

### Inputs

No Select (dropdown) component exists. Use Radio/RadioGroup for small option sets or SegmentedControl for tab-style selection.

| Field is... | Use |
|-------------|-----|
| Single-line text | `<TextField>` |
| Multi-line text | `<TextArea>` |
| Search with clear | `<SearchField>` |
| On/off toggle | `<Switch>` |
| Multiple checkboxes | `<Checkbox>` |
| Single choice from group | `<Radio>` / `<RadioGroup>` |
| Segmented tab selector | `<SegmentedControl>` |
| Numeric range | `<Slider>` |
| Standalone check indicator | `<CheckMark>` |

### Feedback

| Need to... | Use |
|------------|-----|
| Brief auto-dismiss message | `<Snackbar>` |
| Notification with heading + description | `<Toast>` |
| Inline status within page content | `<SectionMessage>` |
| Blocking confirmation dialog | `<Dialog>` (AlertDialog) |
| Empty/error/result state | `<StateView>` |
| Notification count on icon/button | `<PushBadge>` |
| Content loading placeholder | `<Skeleton>` |
| Indeterminate loading indicator | `<Spinner>` |

Snackbar = single message. Toast = heading + detail. Spinner = unknown-duration action. Skeleton = content with known layout. SectionMessage = inline persistent. Dialog = blocks UI.

### Navigation

| Need... | Use |
|---------|-----|
| Mobile bottom tab bar | `<BottomNavigation>` |
| Horizontal category scroll | `<CategoryNavigation>` |
| Pagination dots/numbers | `<PageCounter>` |
| Step/percentage progress | `<ProgressIndicator>` |
| Multi-step process tracker | `<ProgressTracker>` |
| Tab strip for view switching | `<Tab>` |
| App bar / top header | `<TopNavigation>` |

### Overlays

| Need... | Use |
|---------|-----|
| Bottom-anchored modal sheet | `<BottomSheet>` |
| Anchored floating panel | `<Popover>` |
| Modal popup with actions | `<Popup>` |
| Hover/tap hint | `<Tooltip>` |

### Tie-Breakers

| Decision | Rule |
|----------|------|
| Chip vs SegmentedControl | Multi-select/filter -> Chip. Exclusive switching -> SegmentedControl |
| Switch vs Checkbox | Immediate effect -> Switch. Form submission -> Checkbox |
| TextButton vs Button | Inline in content -> TextButton. Standalone CTA -> Button |
| Card vs ActionArea | Content block -> Card. Button group in modal/sheet footer -> ActionArea |
| Badge vs ContentBadge | Count overlay on element -> Badge. Standalone label -> ContentBadge |
| Spinner vs Skeleton | Unknown-duration action -> Spinner. Known-layout content -> Skeleton |

### Composition Rules

- ActionArea expects Button/TextButton children only. Not a generic tappable region.
- Max one `buttonType="filled" color="primary"` Button per section.
- Card must NOT nest inside another Card.
- ListCell trailing: use Switch, ContentBadge, or text string -- not Button.

### What NOT to Do

- No `<div onClick>` for buttons. Use Button, IconButton, or Card.
- No native `<input>`, `<textarea>`, `<select>`. Use TextField, TextArea, Radio/RadioGroup, SegmentedControl.
- No hardcoded hex/rgb colors. Use CSS variables.
- No custom box-shadow cards. Use Card.
- No custom toggle switches. Use Switch.
- No `<IconButton>` without `aria-label`.
- No full-screen spinners. Use inline Skeleton states.
- No blank sections for empty data. Use StateView.

## All Components

### Actions

- **ActionArea** — A bottom-anchored container that groups action buttons for modals, bottom sheets, and screen footers. Handles layout, safe area padding, and an optional gradient fade. | Source: `src/components/ActionArea/ActionArea.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/ActionArea/ActionArea.md`
- **Button** — A clickable element used to trigger primary and secondary actions with label text. | Source: `src/components/Button/Button.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Button/Button.md`
- **Chip** — A compact interactive element used for filters, tags, and selectable labels. Supports avatars, icons, selection state, and a dismissible close button. | Source: `src/components/Chip/Chip.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Chip/Chip.md`
- **FilterButton** — A compact filter selection button with label and trailing chevron icon. Changes visual appearance when active (selected). | Source: `src/components/FilterButton/FilterButton.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/FilterButton/FilterButton.md`
- **IconButton** — A square icon-only button with built-in press states, used for compact actions that are understood from context or an accessible label. | Source: `src/components/IconButton/IconButton.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/IconButton/IconButton.md`
- **TextButton** — A text-only low-emphasis action button used for inline or link-style interactions within content. | Source: `src/components/TextButton/TextButton.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/TextButton/TextButton.md`

### Contents

- **Accordion** — An expandable/collapsible content panel that hides detail until the user requests it. | Source: `src/components/Accordion/Accordion.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Accordion/Accordion.md`
- **Avatar** — Displays a user profile image with an automatic initials fallback, online status indicator, and group stacking via `AvatarGroup`. | Source: `src/components/Avatar/Avatar.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Avatar/Avatar.md`
- **Badge** — A small pill-shaped label for displaying short text, status, or category — with semantic color and style variants. | Source: `src/components/Badge/Badge.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Badge/Badge.md`
- **Card** — A clickable container that groups related content into a self-contained block. | Source: `src/components/Card/Card.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Card/Card.md`
- **ContentBadge** — A small non-interactive label for displaying status, category, or count inline within content. | Source: `src/components/ContentBadge/ContentBadge.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/ContentBadge/ContentBadge.md`
- **ListCard** — A horizontal list item combining a thumbnail, title/subtitle text, and an optional right-side meta value or action. | Source: `src/components/ListCard/ListCard.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/ListCard/ListCard.md`
- **ListCell** — A single-row horizontal list item for settings menus, option lists, and navigation rows. | Source: `src/components/ListCell/ListCell.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/ListCell/ListCell.md`
- **SectionHeader** — A section title row with optional inline and trailing content slots, used to label groups of content. | Source: `src/components/SectionHeader/SectionHeader.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/SectionHeader/SectionHeader.md`

### Inputs

- **Checkbox** — A form control for toggling one or more independent boolean options. Values are submitted with the form. | Source: `src/components/Checkbox/Checkbox.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Checkbox/Checkbox.md`
- **CheckMark** — A lightweight check indicator rendered as an icon only — no box or circle container. Used for read-only confirmation states, table rows, and inline status display. | Source: `src/components/CheckMark/CheckMark.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/CheckMark/CheckMark.md`
- **Radio** — A single-selection control used within a `RadioGroup` to pick one option from a mutually exclusive set. | Source: `src/components/Radio/Radio.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Radio/Radio.md`
- **SearchField** — A single-line search input with a built-in search icon, clear button, and keyboard shortcuts. | Source: `src/components/SearchField/SearchField.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/SearchField/SearchField.md`
- **SegmentedControl** — A compact tab-like selector for switching exclusively between 2–5 views or modes. | Source: `src/components/SegmentedControl/SegmentedControl.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/SegmentedControl/SegmentedControl.md`
- **Slider** — A range input that lets users select a numeric value by dragging a thumb along a track. | Source: `src/components/Slider/Slider.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Slider/Slider.md`
- **Switch** — A binary on/off toggle that takes effect immediately when activated. | Source: `src/components/Switch/Switch.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Switch/Switch.md`
- **TextArea** — A multi-line text input with label, validation feedback, character count, and full controlled/uncontrolled support. | Source: `src/components/TextArea/TextArea.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/TextArea/TextArea.md`
- **TextField** — A single-line text input with label, validation feedback, icon slots, and full controlled/uncontrolled support. | Source: `src/components/TextField/TextField.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/TextField/TextField.md`

### Feedback

- **Dialog** — A blocking modal dialog that interrupts the user to request confirmation or communicate critical information before an irreversible action proceeds. | Source: `src/components/AlertDialog/AlertDialog.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/AlertDialog/Dialog.md`
- **PushBadge** — An overlay badge that wraps another UI element to display a notification count, dot indicator, or "new" marker positioned at the top-right corner. | Source: `src/components/PushBadge/PushBadge.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/PushBadge/PushBadge.md`
- **SectionMessage** — An inline banner component for communicating contextual status — information, success, warning, or error — within a page section without interrupting user flow. | Source: `src/components/SectionMessage/SectionMessage.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/SectionMessage/SectionMessage.md`
- **Skeleton** — A shimmering placeholder that mimics the shape of incoming content while it loads. | Source: `src/components/Skeleton/Skeleton.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Skeleton/Skeleton.md`
- **Snackbar** — A brief, auto-dismissing notification rendered at the bottom of the screen via a portal — for single-line feedback messages with an optional action. | Source: `src/components/Snackbar/Snackbar.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Snackbar/Snackbar.md`
- **Spinner** — An animated circular indicator for indeterminate loading states where the duration is unknown. | Source: `src/components/Spinner/Spinner.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Spinner/Spinner.md`
- **StateView** — A centered content area component for communicating empty states, error states, loading outcomes, and full-page results — with optional figure, title, description, and action slots. | Source: `src/components/StateView/StateView.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/StateView/StateView.md`
- **Toast** — A temporary notification that appears at the bottom of the screen, supporting a bold heading and a supporting description line. Rendered via React Portal. | Source: `src/components/Toast/Toast.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Toast/Toast.md`

### Navigation

- **BottomNavigation** — Fixed bottom tab bar for switching between the app's top-level sections. | Source: `src/components/BottomNavigation/BottomNavigation.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/BottomNavigation/BottomNavigation.md`
- **CategoryNavigation** — Horizontally scrollable chip row for filtering or navigating between content categories. | Source: `src/components/CategoryNavigation/CategoryNavigation.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/CategoryNavigation/CategoryNavigation.md`
- **PageCounter** — Pill-shaped badge displaying the current page position within a total page count. | Source: `src/components/PageCounter/PageCounter.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/PageCounter/PageCounter.md`
- **ProgressIndicator** — Horizontal linear bar showing the percentage completion of a task or process. | Source: `src/components/ProgressIndicator/ProgressIndicator.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/ProgressIndicator/ProgressIndicator.md`
- **ProgressTracker** — Discrete step-by-step tracker showing completed, active, and upcoming steps in a process. | Source: `src/components/ProgressTracker/ProgressTracker.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/ProgressTracker/ProgressTracker.md`
- **Tab** — Underline-style tab strip for switching between views within a section. | Source: `src/components/Tab/Tab.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Tab/Tab.md`
- **TopNavigation** — App bar fixed to the top of a screen, providing a title, leading back/menu button, and trailing actions. | Source: `src/components/TopNavigation/TopNavigation.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/TopNavigation/TopNavigation.md`

### Overlays

- **BottomSheet** — <ListCell title="Option A" onClick={() => setSelected('a')} /> | Source: `src/components/BottomSheet/BottomSheet.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/BottomSheet/BottomSheet.md`
- **Popover** —  | Source: `src/components/Popover/Popover.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Popover/Popover.md`
- **Popup** — <p>Your changes will be saved and applied immediately.</p> | Source: `src/components/Popup/Popup.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Popup/Popup.md`
- **Tooltip** — <Button disabled>Export</Button> | Source: `src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx` | Doc: `src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.md`

## Design Tokens

- [Token Usage Guide](docs/tokens.md): Spacing, typography, radius, and color token reference
- `spacing` -- Primitive scale (base 4px), semantic (screen padding, inset, gaps)
- `typography` -- Semantic styles (headline, body, caption, label) spreadable as inline styles
- `radius` -- Component-specific values (button 8, card 16, input 8, pill 9999)
- CSS variables -- `var(--content-base-default)`, `var(--surface-base-default)`, `var(--divider)`, etc.

## Layout Patterns

- [Layout and Composition](docs/patterns.md): Page structure, forms, lists, empty states
- Screen padding: `spacing.semantic.screen.paddingX` (20px)
- Section gaps: 32-40px; item gaps: 8-16px
- Every list needs: loading (Skeleton), empty (StateView), error (retry), populated
- One primary CTA per section max

## Full Reference

For complete component API documentation, read `llms-full.txt` in this package.
